title: Energizing Smoky Potato Starch Pilaf
description: This energizing smoky and silky Uruguayan dish uses potato starch for a unique twist, cooked until caramelized to create a satisfyingly rich texture.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix potato starch with 4 cups of water until smooth and dissolved.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Stir in tomato paste and cook for another minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.

Gradually add the potato starch mixture to the pan while continuously stirring with a wooden spoon to avoid clumping. Cook until the liquid is absorbed and the mixture starts to thicken and caramelize.
Fold in chopped red bell pepper and smoked paprika. Stir gently to combine all ingredients evenly.
Pour the pilaf into an oven-safe baking dish and bake for 10-15 minutes or until it turns golden brown on top.
Remove from heat, let cool slightly, then serve.
